gap_timeframe_contract.sentence: THO gap/timeframe map: BOTTOM_RELOAD_LONG / SOME_HIGHWAY; price 74.65; support stack 5; parent daily 68.61-69.51; nearest overhead daily 4.51% away; structural overhead daily 4.51% away; channel FLAT 15m OUTSIDE_DOWN.

why: deep bullish gap stack under price
